segments.title: Triage of Link Component Hydration Warning
segments.summary: Justin reports a hydration warning in the `<Link>` component, separate from the Radix issue. The cause is the link prefetch logic mutating attributes after the initial paint, creating a race condition with hydration on slow networks. The proposed fix is to guard the logic to run only on the client-side and schedule it after hydration. They decide to file an issue and postpone the fix until after Alpha 4 unless it's user-facing.
actions: Justin: Guard the link prefetch logic to run only on the client-side and schedule it after hydration.
Justin: File an issue for the Link component hydration warning.
Justin: Add a note to the worklog.
decisions: Punt the fix for the Link component hydration warning to after Alpha 4 unless it becomes a user-facing issue.
segments.retrieval_summary: Decide to postpone `link_component` hydration warning fix until after `alpha_4`; client-side prefetch logic creates race condition. Justin to file issue.
